step_rationale: Thioredoxin upregulated by oxLDL; antioxidant enzyme responding to oxidative modification of retained lipids.
mechanism: TXN expression is induced by oxidized-LDL exposure and protects against lipid-driven oxidative stress in atherogenic lesions.

references.title: Oxidized LDL induces a coordinated up-regulation of the glutathione and thioredoxin systems in human macrophages.
